message.content:
Please run these commands and return the COMPLETE output exactly as-is (every single line):

```bash
echo "=== COMPLETE DRUGS TERM BANK ==="
cat /app/term_banks/drugs.txt

echo ""
echo "=== COMPLETE PHENOTYPES TERM BANK ==="
cat /app/term_banks/phenotypes.txt
```

I need EVERY line from both files, not a summary. Please show the full output.

content.text: I'll run both commands and return the complete output.

input.command: echo "=== COMPLETE DRUGS TERM BANK ===" && cat /app/term_banks/drugs.txt && echo "" && echo "=== COMPLETE PHENOTYPES TERM BANK ===" && cat /app/term_banks/phenotypes.txt
input.description: Display complete contents of both term bank files
